name: Pineapple Financial Inc.
summary: General Pineapple Financial is a Canadian mortgage technology and brokerage company. We provide mortgage brokerage services and technology solutions to Canadian mortgage agents, brokers, sub-brokers, brokerages and consumers. Through data-driven systems and cloud-based tools, we believe we offer competitive advantages in the Canadian mortgage industry relative to traditional broker arrangements. We also provide back-office and pre-underwriting support services (together, the Brokerage Services) ...
